args:
set -eu
rg -n 'ARG CUDA_VERSION|ARG VLLM_USE_PRECOMPILED|ENV VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE|FLASHINFER_VERSION' vllm/docker/Dockerfile >/dev/null
rg -n 'ENV VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE=rocm' vllm/docker/Dockerfile.rocm >/dev/null
rg -n 'VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE=cpu python3 setup.py bdist_wheel' vllm/docker/Dockerfile.cpu >/dev/null
printf 'vllm-docker-build-args\n'
